mandate: Audits for correct usage of common utilities, threading, and logging in remoting/base/.

checklist.auto_thread_usage: Verify that AutoThread is used correctly to manage thread lifetime via TaskRunner references.
checklist.use_host_log: Ensure HOST_LOG is used instead of LOG(INFO) in host code to avoid spamming chrome output.
checklist.com_init_windows: Verify correct COM initialization type (STA/MTA) when creating AutoThread on Windows.
checklist.gce_context_required: Verify that `ComputeEngineServiceClient` is only used when running within a GCE VM instance.
